title: Succession to the Throne Act, 2013
description: Succession to the Throne Act, 2013 (Succession to the Throne Act, 2013). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Succession to the Throne Act, 2013 .

provisions.title: Assent
provisions.content: 2 The alteration in the law touching the Succession to the Throne set out in the bill laid before the Parliament of the United Kingdom and entitled A Bill to Make succession to the Crown not depend on gender; to make provision about Royal Marriages; and for connected purposes is assented to. Footnote *

provisions.title: Coming into force
provisions.content: 3 This Act comes into force on a day to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council.
